text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear it, the tolling of the new
generation's bell? Can you see it, the<n>glimpse of
my evolution into the<n>Centurial Overlord? I feel
both with<n>my very soul.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Only I, the strongest, am worthy of<n>inheriting the
history that the Golden<n>Generation carved with
their cleats.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my next objective is where<n>only the truly
strong fight—the spring<n>Tenno Sho!
